TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: 現代獵人故事
TEXT.citation: 現代獵人故事. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/現代獵人故事
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_現代獵人故事, title = 現代獵人故事, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/現代獵人故事} }

S.FORM: 口述:Batu.Utaw 撰文:Ayu.Payas 種saniq 禁忌, .耆老Batu Yabis在行前就開玩笑說: musa ta qani ga,musa cingay balay ktan maku roziq giwan bon smyah ay , Piku tatak , siy sqru ana qutux pon ungt .後來 Yabis ?uwan ta saras inlungan krayas balay mzuy ,我們沒有按照utux 的 gaga 來做, tatak utux , ,gaga就是 gaga, .

口述:Batu.Utaw 撰文:Ayu.Payas 種saniq 禁忌, .耆老Batu Yabis在行前就開玩笑說: musa ta qani ga,musa cingay balay ktan maku roziq giwan bon smyah ay , Piku tatak , siy sqru ana qutux pon ungt .後來 Yabis ?uwan ta saras inlungan krayas balay mzuy ,我們沒有按照utux 的 gaga 來做, tatak utux , ,gaga就是 gaga, .
S.PHON: **:βatu.utaw **:aju.pajas~ɕ *s~ɕaniq **, .**βatu jaβis~ɕ********: mus~ɕa ta qani ɣa,mus~ɕa ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj ktan maku roziq ɣiwan βon s~ɕmjaħ aj , piku tatak , s~ɕij s~ɕqru ana qutux pon uŋt .** jaβis~ɕ ?uwan ta s~ɕaras~ɕ inluŋan krajas~ɕ βalaj mzuj ,******utux * ɣaɣa **, tatak utux , ,ɣaɣa** ɣaɣa, .
